pages.text_excerpt: News | Rushcliffe Skip to main content Rushcliffe Conservatives Main navigation Contact Home Clubs Councillors Membership News Our map Events The Rushcliffe Legacy What matters to you local survey News Cllr Elena Georgiou joins Rushcliffe Conservatives Wednesday, 24 December, 2025 Cllr Elena Georgiou joins the Conservative Group at Rushcliffe Borough Council. Cllr Elena Georgiou, formerly of the Bingham Independent Group, has joined the ruling Conservative Group at Rushcliffe Borough Council. Cllr Georgiou has represented the Bingham South Ward on Rushcliffe Borough Council since 2023 and sets out why she feels now is the time to join the Conservative Group. “Since my... headings: h2: RSS feeds and news syndication
pages.text_excerpt: About RSS | Rushcliffe Skip to main content Rushcliffe Conservatives Main navigation Contact Home Clubs Councillors Membership News Our map Events The Rushcliffe Legacy What matters to you local survey About RSS RSS feeds and news syndication News feeds Events feeds You can read the latest news from this website using your news reader, or display them on your own website using RSS (Rich Site Summary) XML documents, wherever you see the orange RSS symbol. What is RSS? RSS is a defacto XML standard invented by Netscape for news distribution, now used by thousands of sites. RSS is an open format that uses a simple set of XML tags to define a news "channel" that allows any site to provide basic meta-information about your new content (headline, link, description). Whenever you use our RSS feeds publicly (where anyone but yourself would be reading them), you should provide proper attribution to this website. We cannot provide advice or technical support in the coding and integration of our RSS feeds into your site or software. Additionally we ask that you cache the RSS feed and do not query more than once in any hour. Join or Renew Help us take action on local issues and build a better Britain.
